name: Helmholtz
description: Helmholtz Association-specific metadata profile for classifying research outputs according to strategic research areas and program-oriented funding structures.
ExpectedUse: Metadata enrichment for Helmholtz Association research outputs, enabling portfolio analysis, strategic reporting, and alignment with institutional research classification schemes.

Properties.Name: helmholtzResearchArea
Properties.Title: Helmholtz Research Area
Properties.Description: Helmholtz Association research area classification from the predefined set of six strategic research fields.

Properties.Name: helmholtzPoFStructure
Properties.Title: Program-Oriented Funding Structure
Properties.Description: Helmholtz Program-Oriented Funding (PoF) structure identifier indicating the hierarchical research program classification.
